description_long: This hardware store is a rectangular, modern commercial building with a flat, light gray roof and a facade clad in a textured, medium-gray material resembling concrete or stone. The front features a large, dark-framed glass door and a matching window, both set into the facade and providing visibility into the interior. The door and window are symmetrically arranged, with the door on the right and the window on the left when facing the building. The sides and rear of the building are plain, with no visible windows, doors, or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The structure appears solid and robust, suitable for urban environments, and lacks any visible signage, advertisements, or exterior displays. The overall appearance is clean, minimalistic, and functional, with a focus on durability and straightforward access.
description: A modern, rectangular hardware store with a flat gray roof, textured gray facade, and a large glass door and window on the front. The sides and rear are plain and unadorned, emphasizing a utilitarian, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large glass door on the right and a matching window on the left, both framed in black against a textured gray facade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, solid gray wall with no windows or doors, highlighting the building's minimalistic design.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without any doors or windows, presenting a featureless gray surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, unbroken gray wall and no architectural features.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a large glass door and a window, both framed in black and symmetrically placed on a textured gray facade. There are no exterior displays, signage, or decorative elements visible.
